title: phleum abbreviatum
intro: Phleum abbreviatum, also known as short-tailed meadow-grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as bloating, indigestion, and coughs. The herbal preparations of Phleum abbreviatum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation.
